title: The Crime Doctor's Gamble
writer: Raymond L. Schrock, Jerry Warner, Edward Bock
actors: Warner Baxter, Micheline Cheirel, Roger Dann
plot: On a lecture/vacation visit to Paris, Dr. Ordway drops in on his friend, the Prefecture of Police. He becomes involved in a case involving the stabbing of an old man. The man's son, not all that mentally stable, believes he killed...
